cases.passage: The school had organized a cleanliness drive on the eve of Independence Day. Students, teachers, and the non-teaching staff worked together to clean the school premises, including the playground, classrooms, and corridors. They collected trash, swept the floors, and painted the walls. The school's principal, Mrs. Smith, appreciated the efforts of the students and staff, saying that cleanliness is next to godliness. The school's surroundings were transformed, making it a pleasant place to study and relax. The students felt proud of their school and were eager to maintain it in the same condition. The cleanliness drive was a huge success, and the school's management decided to make it an annual event.

questions.q: Who was the main person who appreciated the efforts of the students and staff?
questions.explanation: The school's principal, Mrs. Smith, appreciated the efforts of the students and staff.

questions.q: Why did the school's management decide to make the cleanliness drive an annual event?
opts: The students felt proud of their school
The cleanliness drive was a huge success
questions.explanation: The cleanliness drive was a huge success, and the school's management decided to make it an annual event.

questions.q: What did the students collect during the cleanliness drive?
questions.explanation: They collected trash during the cleanliness drive.

questions.q: Why did the students feel proud of their school?
opts: The school's management decided to make the cleanliness drive an annual event
questions.explanation: The students felt proud of their school and were eager to maintain it in the same condition.

questions.q: What was the occasion for the cleanliness drive?
questions.explanation: The school had organized a cleanliness drive on the eve of Independence Day.

cases.passage: The school's annual sports day was a grand event. The students had been practicing for weeks, and their hard work paid off. The principal, Mr. Kumar, welcomed the guests and declared the sports day open. The students participated in various events, including the 100-meter dash, long jump, and shot put. The school's basketball team won the championship, and the students were overjoyed. The sports day was a huge success, and the students looked forward to next year's event. The school's management decided to give a cash prize to the winning team.

questions.q: Who declared the sports day open?
questions.explanation: The principal, Mr. Kumar, welcomed the guests and declared the sports day open.

questions.q: What event did the school's basketball team win?
questions.explanation: The school's basketball team won the championship.

questions.q: What did the school's management decide to give to the winning team?
questions.explanation: The school's management decided to give a cash prize to the winning team.

questions.q: Why did the students look forward to next year's event?
opts: The sports day was a huge success
The school's management decided to give a cash prize to the winning team
The students had a great time
questions.explanation: The sports day was a huge success, and the students looked forward to next year's event.

questions.q: What had the students been practicing for weeks?
questions.explanation: The students had been practicing for weeks, and their hard work paid off.
